error: op_host/downsample_bilinear_custom_mnjashspszlcwdop20260310034448.cpp:47:66: error: cannot convert ‘const gert::Shape*’ to ‘const gert::StorageShape*’ in initialization
summary: Host InferShape must use gert::Shape* from context->GetInputShape(0), while StorageShape is only appropriate in tiling. Mixing them causes op_host compilation failure with a Shape-to-StorageShape conversion error.

For this fixed-size bilinear downsample kernel, the arithmetic was correct but multi-core NC partitioning produced large scattered mismatches. Falling back to blockDim=1 and processing all NC planes in one core removed the partition/offset issue and passed correctness.
